author: Office of Senator Mark Warner (Flickr: Mark Warner)
notes: Local file is a square crop of this exact photo (Senate Intelligence Committee hearing, Washington D.C., 2018-09-05) from Senator Mark Warner's Flickr stream. Verified visually; not modified.

No acceptably-licensed image found. Wikimedia Commons has no photo of him (Wikidata Q28449997 has no P18 image). The only Flickr photo located (JedMcCalebJoyceKimStellar, flickr.com/photos/134236968@N07/19352937984) is CC BY-ND, which is not acceptable. Local file (likely a Stellar/press headshot, provenance unknown) left untouched.

author: Seattle City Council
notes: Local file is a square crop of this exact photo (Amazon Spheres grand opening, 2018-01-29); a Commons '(cropped)' variant of the same file exists with near-identical framing. Verified visually; not modified.

author: Peter Dasilva, European Union (EC Audiovisual Service)
notes: Previous local image (casual smiling shot, wooden wall with paper-bird decor) matched no Commons file; provenance unknown, so it was replaced. New image: 2024 portrait taken during Josep Borrell's US visit (EC Audiovisual Service P-063789), top-anchored 1129x1129 square crop resized to 460x460.

author: TechCrunch (Flickr; photo _SJP2372 by Steve Jennings for TechCrunch)
notes: Local file is a square crop of this exact photo (TechCrunch Disrupt SF 2013). Commons artist field credits TechCrunch's Flickr account. Verified visually; not modified.

author: Paul Elledge / Citadel Enterprise Americas LLC
notes: Local file is a square crop of this exact portrait. Commons metadata: Artist = Paul Elledge, Credit = Citadel Enterprise Americas LLC, CC BY-SA 4.0. Matches the provided hint. Verified visually; not modified.

author: Oracle Corporate Communications
notes: Local file is a square crop of this exact photo (Oracle OpenWorld, 2009-10-15, from Oracle's Flickr); framing matches the Commons '(cropped)' variant of the same file. Verified visually; not modified.

author: Marcin Mycielski, European Parliament (Commons user Stansfield)
notes: Local file is a square crop of this exact photo (European Parliament, 2009-06-17). File is multi-licensed GFDL + cc-by-sa-all (CC BY-SA 1.0 through 4.0); CC BY-SA 4.0 recorded. Verified visually; not modified.

author: Craig McDean (for Emerson Collective)
notes: Local file is a square crop of this exact portrait. License independently verified at the original source (emersoncollective.com/articles/q-and-a-with-ec-founder-and-president-laurene-powell-jobs): 'Photography by Craig McDean. Licensed to the public under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 license.' Not modified.

author: EdTech Stanford University School of Medicine (Flickr)
notes: Local file is a square crop of this exact photo (Stanford School of Medicine event, 2010-09-29, Flickr IMG_5485). This is the exact Commons file the hint referred to. Verified visually; not modified.

author: U.S. Department of Homeland Security
notes: Previous local image was the widely-circulated press headshot with no free license found anywhere; replaced. New image is a face crop (96x96 region upscaled to 460x460) of the 2016-06-15 DHS naturalization-ceremony photo — the same public-domain source English Wikipedia uses (File:MacKenzie Scott.jpg is a tiny crop of it). Quality is limited because her face is only ~40px in the 1280x854 original; this is the only freely-licensed photo of her that exists.
